arts.ttl: Tottenham “believe they can tempt” 14-G/A Aston Villa target to join them
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are keen on signing the Chelsea attacker Noni Madueke at the end of the season. The 23-year-old has done quite well for the Blues this season, and he has 14 goal contributions in all competitions. He is reportedly on the radar of Aston Villa as well. arts.ttl: Player continues to shine away from Wolves – Fits club ‘like a glove’, latest big performance vital
arts.sum: Fábio Silva is continuing to shine away from Wolverhampton Wanderers and setting up a big summer transfer window. Marca cover the player today after he was the key man again this weekend, leading Las Palmas to a comeback that has revived Las Palmas’ chances of avoiding relegation. arts.ttl: The young coach making big waves at Tottenham and catching the eye of those in the game
arts.sum: When the final whistle blew on Friday night at the Lamex Stadium, Stuart Lewis pumped his fists in delight as Tottenham clinched the U17 Premier League Cup. Development is the key for any academy side and to see three youth products in Moore, Dane Scarlett and Ajayi all score on the same night in Spurs' Europa League victory against Elfsborg in January would have brought as much pride for Lewis as Friday night's latest trophy win did, for ultimately the aim of any youth set-up is to guide these gifted children all the way to success in the men's game.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Daniel Levy Stance on Tottenham Selling Udogie Emerges
arts.sum: Exclusive: Daniel Levy will only consider selling Tottenham star Destiny Udogie to Man City for a 'huge' offer.

arts.ttl: Tottenham man admits unknown injury ruined arrival at club – Yet to really bounce back
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur youngster Alejo Veliz has admitted his arrival at the club was somewhat difficult for him as he arrived with an unknown injury. The striker has been speaking to Ole about his time in Europe so far, which is yet to really get going for him. arts.ttl: Wolves vs Tottenham Prediction: Team News, Predicted Lineups and Where To Watch
arts.sum: Wolves, currently 17th in the Premier League, host 14th-placed Tottenham at Molineux on Sunday, April 13th, with kick-off scheduled for 14:00. Both teams will be eager to secure a victory and improve ...

arts.ttl: Postecoglou hails Son Heung-min for putting team first despite lack of goals
arts.sum: The Tottenham captain has failed to score from open play in his last 15 club appearances.

arts.ttl: Tottenham wonderkid makes big claim about future after thrilling performance
arts.sum: Lewis' style of football is the Tottenham way the supporters want to see and much of the attacking on display on Friday night was breathless from the side in white, with the ball rarely far from their feet of their young talisman Williams-Barnett. Lewis knows Spurs inside out, having come into the academy himself as a 16-year-old player, and that helps him identify with the journey his young charges are now on.

arts.ttl: Information for fans travelling to Frankfurt| Tottenham Hotspur
arts.sum: Supporters are advised to go to O’Reilly’s Irish Pub before taking a police escort via trains from Frankfurt (Main) Hauptbahnhof to Frankfurt am Main Stadion station. On matchday, supporters are advised to go to O’Reilly’s Irish Pub, opposite Frankfurt (Main) Hauptbahnhof, the central station.

arts.ttl: 'My dreams, not yours' - Cunha angers Wolves fans with deleted Instagram post
arts.sum: If Matheus Cunha wanted to leave Wolves on a good note, a deleted Instagram post won’t help his cause.
